executive_summary: - Added PocketBase handler to enable integration with PocketBase collections via MindsDB.
- Implemented authentication using PocketBase credentials and updated connection parameters.
- Enhanced MindsDB SQL query handling to support PocketBase table operations.
- Updated documentation to reflect new functionality and usage examples.
- Improved error handling and added tests for critical changes.

change_units.title: PocketBase Handler Integration
change_units.description: Adds a new feature to connect PocketBase collections to MindsDB for analytics and predictions.
change_units.inferred_intent: Non-breaking change to extend MindsDB functionality.
change_units.evidence: Commit #1675 - additional test for mysql api

change_units.title: MSSQL Query Execution Result Conversion
change_units.description: Fixed issue in converting MSSQL results to PocketBase table format.
change_units.inferred_intent: Corrected a bug affecting data synchronization.
change_units.evidence: Diff shows improved handling of result sets in PocketBase.

change_units.title: Environment Variables Support
change_units.description: Added support for environment variables in MindsDB configuration.
change_units.evidence: Files list shows updated environment variable handling.

change_units.title: Updated Documentation
change_units.description: Updated docs to reflect new features and usage of PocketBase integration.
change_units.inferred_intent: Ensured clarity and completeness of documentation.
change_units.evidence: Files list includes updated documentation content.

risks_and_concerns: Potential for misconfiguration due to new environment variables.
Ensuring secure handling of PocketBase credentials in production.
Testing across different MindsDB versions to confirm compatibility.
